scripts.publish:pypi: npm run build:python && python3 -m twine upload dist/*.whl dist/*.tar.gz
scripts.release:github: npm run build:binary && npm run release:create && npm run release:upload
scripts.publish:all: npm run changelog && npm run publish:pypi && npm run publish:npm && npm run release:github
scripts.publish:npm:beta: npm run build:binary && npm publish --tag beta
scripts.release:github:beta: npm run build:binary && npm run release:create:beta && npm run release:upload
scripts.publish:all:beta: npm run changelog && npm run publish:pypi && npm run publish:npm:beta && npm run release:github:beta
